title: Home Screen - Disconnecting/Connecting one earbud at a time
scenario: Home Screen earbud images and battery indicators update correctly when disconnecting/reconnecting individual earbuds on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen with a true wireless earbud device (e.g., Voyager Free 60/60+ or Voyager Free 20) connected (both earbuds in case, connected to phone).
2. Verify the Home screen shows both Left and Right earbud images with battery indicators, and the device connection status shows "Connected".
3. Remove the Left earbud from the charging case (or disconnect it via Bluetooth settings).
4. Observe the Home screen: verify the Left earbud image is greyed out and its battery indicator is removed/greyed, while the Right earbud remains active with its battery indicator.
5. Verify the overall device connection status still shows "Connected".
6. Place the Left earbud back in the charging case (or reconnect it).
7. Observe the Home screen: verify the Left earbud image and battery indicator are restored (no longer greyed out).
8. Verify the overall device connection status still shows "Connected".
9. Repeat steps 3-8 for the Right earbud (remove/reconnect Right earbud while Left remains connected).
10. Remove both Left and Right earbuds from the charging case (or disconnect both via Bluetooth settings).
11. Observe the Home screen: verify both Left and Right earbud images are greyed out and both battery indicators are removed/greyed.
12. Verify the overall device connection status changes to "Disconnected".
expected: Home screen correctly updates earbud images and battery indicators (greyed out when disconnected, restored when reconnected). Overall device connection status remains "Connected" as long as at least one earbud is connected. When both earbuds are disconnected, status changes to "Disconnected" and all earbud images/battery indicators are greyed out.
